name: What if AEO blocks my expert witness?
description: **Motion for expert NDA access.** Standard practice.[4]

mainEntity.name: What if AEO blocks my expert witness?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Motion for expert NDA access.** Standard practice.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Courts often allow expert access to AEO via NDA or in camera review.** Expert quals justify.[4] Key factors: Motion with expert CV. Usage limits. No party sharing. Common in IP cases. File early.
